expected_solution_keywords: How to match a String against string literals?
memory_hint:
How to match a String against string literals?.

You can do something like this:

match &stringthing[..] {
    "a" => println!("0"),
    "b" => println!("1"),
    "c" => println!("2"),
    _ => println!("something else!"),
}
